spec.subject: a sci-fi pistol with ventilation panel array on the right side, hard-surface detail

lighting.key: cool white studio light from camera-left, 6000K, soft box, primary illumination
lighting.fill: warm bounce card from camera-right, 4800K, one-third key intensity
lighting.rim: narrow backlight from above-rear separating pistol silhouette from dark background

palette.dominant: dark charcoal and matte black panel surfaces, ~#1E1E1E
palette.accent: subtle metallic mid-grey edge wear and bevel highlights, ~#8A8A8A

composition.foreground: pistol grip angled toward camera, slight depth-of-field softness on nearest edge
composition.midground: full pistol body in sharp focus — barrel, slide, vent panel array
composition.background: seamless dark studio void, minimal reflected light
composition.hero: the five-panel vent array (Pistol.Vent.R) running along the right side of the slide

materials.notes: DarkPanel.001 — roughness ~0.75, no specularity, slight anisotropic micro-scratch normal map along panel length, subtle edge wear at bevel corners
roughness ~0.55, metallic 1.0, fine directional brush marks normal map, light edge wear at contact points
roughness ~0.85, bump map from cross-hatch knurl pattern, no metallic
exterior roughness ~0.60, metallic 1.0; slight oxidation tint near muzzle

density.scattered: none — single isolated hero object, no scattering

spec.scale_notes: Full pistol approximately 200mm long x 130mm tall x 35mm wide (compact semi-auto proportions). Vent panel array spans ~60mm along slide, five panels each ~10mm wide with 2mm gaps. Camera distance ~0.6m to fill 85mm frame cleanly.
